name: Jessi Wyatt
text: I can't say enough good things about Brynn's work! I had my brows, eyeliner, and lips done and I'm absolutely obsessed with the results. She made me feel so comfortable the entire time, and her attention to detail is unmatched. Everything looks soft, natural, and beautifully healed. I'm beyond happy I found her here in Florida. She's truly an artist!

name: Tracy White
text: Brynn is the only person I'd trust with my face. Her nano brows gave me the fluffiest, most natural shape, and my lip blush turned out flawless. She has such a calming energy and years of experience from Colorado. Florida seriously lucked out when she moved here. I love Brynn!

name: Lindsey Mallon
text: Brynn is the best! Her nano brows and lip blush work are seriously unmatched, so natural and detailed. After years of perfecting her craft in Boulder, it makes me so happy to see her thriving in Florida. Her clients down here are in such good hands!

name: Amanda
text: If you are hesitant, don't be! Brynn is the only one I trust with my face. My brows look so natural and I get compliments every single day.

name: Verified Client
text: Brynn is absolutely incredible! My eyebrows look so natural. I was nervous because I've heard of so many bad microblading experiences, but nano brows is the way to go!

name: Verified Client
text: Brynn is so talented and professional and makes me feel right at home. I would not trust anyone else with my permanent makeup.
